name: New-Wave Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon each marjoram, paprika and dried parsley
12 ounces each ground beef and turkey
1/3 cup liquid no-cholesterol fat-free egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread and onion in food processor and whirl.
2. Add tomatoes, marjoram, paprika, parsley, and pepper; whirl.
3. Combine beef, turkey, and egg substitute with the bread mixture in a bowl.
4. Pack the mixture into a 6-cup ring mold.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F for 50 minutes.
6. Unmold onto a platter.
7. Beef Gravy:
a. Sauté 1 small chopped onion in 1 tablespoon vegetable oil.
b. Blend in 2 tablespoons flour.
c. Add 3/4 cup condensed beef broth and 1/2 cup water.
d. Cook, stirring until the mixture thickens and boils.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
